items.title: DevOps & Cloud
items.text: Production infrastructure on GCP and AWS with Docker, Kubernetes and Terraform. CI/CD pipelines and multi-country deployments with high availability.

items.title: AI-Augmented Dev
items.text: AI-Assisted workflows with Claude Code and Cursor accelerating delivery by 60%. Agentic pipelines for code generation, review and deployment.

items.title: Legacy to Microservices
items.text: Monolith-to-NestJS migrations (from LoopBack 3) with saga patterns, event-driven systems (Pub/Sub) and progressive decoupling without downtime.
